retry_reason: kmem_cache_destroy is unconditional and always succeeds in properly designed code; failure would indicate a kernel bug, so retry is pointless.
contract_summary: This function releases references to the two global slab caches (btrfs_free_space_cachep and btrfs_free_space_bitmap_cachep) and destroys them if their reference counts drop to zero. It is a cleanup wrapper called during module exit. After calling, the caches must not be used. The caller (module exit path) should guarantee no other references exist before invocation.
